description: Lock digital_subscriber_line_dsl to standardized ADSL/DSL copper access technology, not generic broadband Internet service.

checks.reason: The node is scoped to standardized ADSL transceivers, anchored to ITU-T G.992.1 approval in 1999.
ADSL transceivers require signal-processing line coding and modem implementation.
Existing telephone access plant and central-office side infrastructure scaled DSL deployment.
TCP/IP is a major service carried over DSL access, not a direct prerequisite for ADSL transceivers.
